title: freaky cat totem
description: puts the freaky cat on the totem of undying
body: Just a simple change to add my 2nd favorite cat(my own cat coming in first ofc) to the totem of undying.Thanks to NeoOrNoN for helping with stuff i can get my head around.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/i4IDOMcSMwY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
